note: Machine-relative ceilings. Run node test/calibrate-budgets.mjs in each enforcement environment; commit worsening only with an explicit recorded trade-off.
statistic: Exact for byte gauges; minimum of repeated samples for timing and DOM-batch gauges.

budgets.rationale: Exact file size after a deterministic build.
Exact file size after a deterministic build.

budgets.description: Frozen HTML size for the math-heavy reference corpus
budgets.rationale: Exact UTF-8 snapshot size. Frozen artifacts embed exactly the canonical canvas + self-contained KaTeX stylesheet (web chrome CSS excluded since the explicit-stylesheet unification), one inert portable payload, and the frozen client; ratcheted from the Phase 4 styled baseline through the Phase 7 canonicalization.

budgets.description: Frozen HTML size for the PNG/SVG reference corpus
budgets.rationale: Exact UTF-8 snapshot size including assets. Frozen artifacts embed exactly the canonical canvas + self-contained KaTeX stylesheet (web chrome CSS excluded since the explicit-stylesheet unification), one inert portable payload, and the frozen client; ratcheted from the Phase 4 styled baseline through the Phase 7 canonicalization.

budgets.description: Mean frozen-HTML build time (20 warm builds) for the math-heavy reference corpus
budgets.rationale: Mean of a 20-build loop defeats timer coarsening; 3x ceiling plus a 25ms floor absorbs host noise.

budgets.description: Mean frozen-HTML build time (20 warm builds) for the PNG/SVG reference corpus
budgets.rationale: Mean of a 20-build loop defeats timer coarsening; 3x ceiling plus a 25ms floor absorbs host noise.

budgets.description: Cold navigation to the visible interactive landing composer
budgets.rationale: Minimum of isolated browser-context samples; 3x ceiling absorbs startup noise.

budgets.description: DOM mutation batches for a fixed 40-update synthetic stream
budgets.rationale: Minimum observed batch count on an otherwise-quiescent page; 2x ceiling with a 6-batch floor catches loss of rAF coalescing (which produces dozens of batches) without flaking.

budgets.description: Total browser duration for a fixed 40-update synthetic stream
budgets.rationale: Minimum of repeated samples; 3x ceiling absorbs browser scheduling noise.

budgets.description: Elapsed time from final streamed DOM update until the final markdown is persisted
budgets.rationale: Minimum of repeated samples; 2x ceiling with a 100ms floor (poll quantization) still catches a lost flush-on-complete, which costs 400ms+.
